'''Ice Cats''' were predatory felines native to [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]]. Like [[Spiner]]s, they could attack their prey by shooting quills from their fur. They were also found on [[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Super Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-11-XX -->''[[Super Empire Strikes Back Official Game Secrets]]''
